Variables.Name: PingExtrapolation
Variables.Description:
Value between 0 and 1 which indicates how much velocity
		and ping based correction to use

Variables.Name: PingLimit
Variables.Description: For the purpose of extrapolation, ping will be clamped to this value

Variables.Name: MaxRestoredStateError
Variables.Description: Maximum allowable error for a state to be considered "resolved"

Variables.Name: PositionLerp
Variables.Description:
How much to directly lerp to the correct position. Generally
		increase precision along with jerkiness.

Variables.Name: AngleLerp
Variables.Description: How much to directly lerp to the correct angle.

Variables.Name: LinearVelocityCoefficient
Variables.Description:
This is the coefficient `k` in the differential equation:
		the velocity in a replication step.

Variables.Name: AngularVelocityCoefficient
Variables.Description: This is the angular analog to LinearVelocityCoefficient.

Variables.Name: ErrorAccumulationSeconds
Variables.Description:
Number of seconds to remain in a heuristically
		unresolveable state before hard snapping.

Variables.Name: ErrorAccumulationDistanceSq
Variables.Description:
If the body has moved less than the square root of
		frame, then error may accumulate towards a hard snap.

Variables.Name: ErrorAccumulationSimilarity
Variables.Description:
If the previous error projected onto the current error
		hard snap.
